name: Gilaki
notes: STUB: the grapheme inventory of Gilaki is NOT yet specified (graphemes/allophones are empty). Gilaki is a Northwestern Iranian language of Gilan Province, Iran, written in the Perso-Arabic script — an ABJAD: short vowels are normally not written, so a grapheme→IPA table cannot be complete without vocalisation. INPUT CONTRACT: Perso-Arabic Gilaki text; a fully vocalised (diacriticised) or romanised input would be required for reliable G2P, in the same way the zh spec requires pinyin.
